textPlain:
Apple obeys the law. 
Policians set the law.
You vote for politicians.So nu, it makes no sense to blame Apple here.
Something's wrong with the CSS on this page. The end of every line is cut off.

Who is "that one" Heather Burns? All I can find is that she's an American actress, which seems a bit at odds with the UK/tech focus of the article.Also, why is Apple disabling ADP, and why are they right? Is it because of the UK wanting to snoop on all communications? I wish the article would at least mention one sentence for explanation, rather than tell me I'm not paying the author for the privilege.
Like most posts, acronyms are flung without disambiguation.  "Tucker Carlson Network" searches higher than the intended target of "TCN" in the article.
While waiting for this site to come back up can someone explain the word “appling”? Is that a typo?
Wouldn’t it be easier to just move away from the UK? (I jest, but actually…)
it does if you're clickbaiting via ragebait, like she is?
Same for me. You can get around it by zooming in.
> Who is "that one" Heather Burns?Like most personal websites, this one prominently features an "about" page, which will likely answer this question to your satisfaction.
"Apple-ing"turning a name into a verb is common these days

Changing countries is not a simple matter. Immigration to most nations is highly restricted (and UK citizens lost a lot of options after Brexit, although it is, at least, easier for them to go to other Commonwealth nations but still a challenge).I’m in a position where I may end up emigrating thanks to the US regime making life very uncomfortable for my ex-wife and mother of my children who’s here legally but because government thugs have been given the green light to kidnap people who look like her off the streets and have been doing so in our upper middle class suburban neighborhood leaving her reluctant to do things like go to Mexican businesses or even go for a walk in the neighborhood. Fortunately, because our kids qualify for Mexican citizenship through their mother, they serve as anchor babies for my emigration. If my wife were merely Latino and only had US citizenship, we would not have that option.
